{"id":"smallhold-c8oq","title":"Lists (custom account groupings with timeline)","description":"## What
Implement the Mastodon Lists feature: named groups of followed accounts with a dedicated filtered timeline and configurable replies_policy.

## Why
Users want to organize their follows into topic-based groups and read focused timelines without noise from their full home feed.

## Scope
- DB schema: lists and list_accounts tables
- CRUD endpoints for lists (/api/v1/lists)
- Account membership endpoints (/api/v1/lists/:id/accounts)
- List timeline endpoint (/api/v1/timelines/list/:id)
- replies_policy enforcement
- 50 lists per persona limit","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T04:18:59Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T04:18:59Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-0bwa","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:19:56Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-llgi","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:19:56Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-p2gj","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T21:19:57Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
